headline: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. issued a press release announcing its financial results for the fiscal quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: This earnings release is a primary catalyst for the stock, requiring immediate review of the attached Exhibit 99.1 for revenue, EPS, and forward guidance. Analysts will focus on the non-GAAP reconciliations to assess core operating performance and update valuation models accordingly.
